portfolio.title: Architectural Projection
portfolio.description: Large-scale building facade mapping for corporate event — exterior transformed into an immersive visual canvas synchronized to live music.

portfolio.title: Interactive Installation
portfolio.description: Motion-responsive projection using depth sensors — visuals react in real-time to audience movement, making every visitor part of the piece.

portfolio.title: Concert Visuals
portfolio.description: Audio-reactive visual content and projection for live performance — custom backdrops that breathe with the music in real-time.

portfolio.title: Art Gallery Installation
portfolio.description: Immersive gallery environment merging sculptural elements with projected light — a multi-dimensional space that shifts as you move through it.

portfolio.title: Product Launch Event
portfolio.description: Brand activation using projection to reveal product features — dramatic moments engineered to stick in memory long after the event ends.

portfolio.title: Festival Stage Design
portfolio.description: Multi-layer projection for a festival main stage — environmental and weather-responsive visuals that turn the stage into a living organism.

services.title: Architectural Projection
services.description: Custom content designed for building facades and large-scale surfaces. From concept to on-site execution. Includes 3D mapping, content production, and projection setup.

services.title: Concert & Live Visuals
services.description: Audio-reactive VJ sets, custom visual packs, and real-time performance visuals. Built in Resolume or Synesthesia, tailored to your set and aesthetic.

services.title: Interactive Installation
services.description: Sensor-driven, audience-responsive installations for galleries, events, and brand activations. TouchDesigner-based, depth cameras, MIDI, and more.

services.title: Fine Art & Commissions
services.description: Original paintings, tufted rugs, mixed media, and 3D printed art. Hand-made, one-of-a-kind pieces built to your vision or my creative direction.

services.title: Brand Activation
services.description: Projection-driven product reveals, immersive launch experiences, and trade show installations that create lasting visual impressions.

services.title: Product Photography
services.description: Professional product and art photography with Nikon DSLR. Ideal for Etsy sellers, small businesses, and artists building their portfolio.
